FacilitatorFallback._CopyTypeDoc: MinimalCopy (faster, structure-only) or FullCopy (full data clone)
FacilitatorFallback._MaxAsyncWaitTimeMinutesDoc: How long to poll pac admin copy before giving up (default 120)
FacilitatorFallback._SkipAuditDataDoc: true to skip audit history during copy (faster, recommended)

SharePoint.SiteDescription: Copilot Studio for Financial Services workshop data source

Teams.WorkshopTeamName: Copilot Studio for Financial Services Workshop

Workshop._EnvironmentPurposeDoc: Safety guard for the environment referenced by EnvironmentUrl. Valid values: 'Student' (per-student sandbox), 'FacilitatorDemo' (facilitator-only demo base), 'Fallback' (facilitator-only rebuilt fallback target), 'Shared' (shared student prerequisites). Facilitator-only scripts (Import-WorkshopEnterpriseAssets, Set-WorkshopFacilitatorFallbackSource, Export-WorkshopFacilitatorArtifactLayers, Invoke-WorkshopFacilitatorBindingRepair, Invoke-WorkshopFacilitatorFallbackBuild, Invoke-WorkshopFacilitatorFallbackValidation, Remove-WorkshopFacilitatorEnvironment) refuse to run unless EnvironmentPurpose is 'FacilitatorDemo' or 'Fallback'.

SampleServiceRequest.Title: Unauthorized charge on credit card
SampleServiceRequest.Description: Customer reports a $150 charge they did not authorize on their Woodgrove Visa card ending in 4532

Governance._Doc: Facilitator-only settings for the combined ALM + Governance module's Three-Zones (PowerCAT teaching pattern) demo. Students do NOT receive three environments; these are facilitator-managed demo envs only.

Autonomous._Doc: Facilitator-only settings for the Autonomous Borrower-Watch Tier-2 Triage demo (Lab P1-4). Triggers must be disabled after the workshop to avoid burning Copilot Credits — see Disable-WorkshopAutonomousTriggers.ps1.

ComponentCollections._Doc: Cross-day Component Collections asset (Day 1 micro-addition + Day 2 micro-addition). Replaces the deprecated 'KYC Knowledge' framing — see facilitator guide.
